description:
Jubilant FoodWorks is the master franchise for Domino’s and Dunkin Donuts in addition to their own brand – Hong’s kitchen. With more than 1250 restaurants, it is one of the largest QSR chains around. In this episode of This is My Architecture, Anand from Jubilant FoodWorks talks about their newly set up data lake, which is powering near real-time insights to the business, as well as CRM marketing and multiple AI models.
